slides.title: Memory 1 — First Spark
slides.text: A quiet beginning. The first story star is your entry point into the constellation.

slides.title: Memory 2 — Turning Point
slides.text: A small shift in direction changes the path. This panel is easy to edit later.

slides.title: Memory 3 — Echo
slides.text: A repeated signal comes back stronger, shaping the route through the night.

slides.title: Memory 4 — Drift
slides.text: Not everything is linear. This memory marks a curved detour before the climb.

slides.title: Memory 5 — Alignment
slides.text: For a moment, fragments align. The pattern becomes readable and calm.

slides.title: Memory 6 — Threshold
slides.text: Crossing this point unlocks the next phase. Keep advancing through the sequence.

slides.title: Memory 7 — Bloom
slides.text: Details appear where there was noise. The story starts to feel intentional.

slides.title: Memory 8 — Compression
slides.text: The distance narrows and the pace quickens. Focus on the active highlight.

slides.title: Memory 9 — Signal
slides.text: A clear marker in the dark. This slide can later hold a custom image and copy.

slides.title: Memory 10 — Resolve
slides.text: The constellation now has momentum. Every click connects the narrative.

slides.title: Memory 11 — Nearing End
slides.text: The final nodes gather near each other, preparing the close of the arc.
